templatestyles-desc: Ku dabaq qaabab CSS oo gaar ah qaab-dhismeed kasta
templatestyles-missing-src: Astaanta src ee TemplateStyles ma noqon karto mid madhan.
templatestyles-invalid-src: Ciwaanka aan sax ahayn ee astaanta src ee TemplateStyles.
templatestyles-invalid-wrapper: Qiimaha aan sax ahayn ee astaanta wrapper ee TemplateStyles.
templatestyles-bad-src-missing: Bogga [[:$1|$2]] wax nuxur ah kuma jiro.
templatestyles-bad-src: Bogga [[:$1|$2]] waa inuu lahaadaa nooca nuxurka "{{int:content-model-sanitized-css}}" si uu u shaqeeyo TemplateStyles (nooca hadda waa "$3").
templatestyles-size-exceeded: Stylesheet-ku wuu ka weyn yahay xadka ugu badan ee $2.
templatestyles-page-error-category-desc: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la farsameynayay tag-ga ee bogga.
templatestyles-error-at-rule-block-not-a: Xannibaad lama oggola ee @$3 ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-at-rule-block-requi: Xannibaad ayaa loo baahan yahay ee @$3 ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-bad-character-in-ur: Xaraf aan sax ahayn ayaa ku jira URL-ka ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-bad-escape: Xaraf aan sax ahayn oo ku jira baxsasho laynka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-bad-value-for-prope: Qiime aan sax ahayn ama aan la taageerin ee sifo $3 ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-colon: La filayay labo dhibic ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-declaratio: La filayay bayaal ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
La filayay liiska qeexidda ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-eof: La filayay dhammaadka stylesheet-ka ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-ident: La filayay calaamad aqoonsi ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-page-margi: La filayay @page xeerka margin ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-qualified-: La filayay qaab xeer ah ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-expected-stylesheet: La filayay stylesheet ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-font-face-a: @font-face ma oggola wax ka hor block-ga ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-font-featur: @$3 ma oggola wax ka hor xanibaadda ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
Qiime aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay sifo font feature value ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
Liis font aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay @font-feature-values ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-import-valu: Qiime aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay @import ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-keyframe-na: Magac keyframe aan sax ahayn ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-media-query: Su'aal warbaahin aan sax ahayn ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-namespace-v: Qiime aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay @namespace ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-page-margin: @$3 ma oggola wax ka hor block-ga ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-page-rule-c: Waxa ku jira content aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay @page ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-page-select: Doorasho bog aan sax ahayn ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-selector-li: Liiska selector aan sax ahayn ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-invalid-supports-co: Shuruud aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay @supports ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-misordered-rule: Xeer aan sax ahayn oo kala horeyn ah ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-font-featur: Liis font ah oo maqan oo loogu talagalay @font-feature-values ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-import-sour: Isha iloobay isha @import ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-keyframe-na: Magac maqan oo loogu talagalay @keyframes ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-namespace-v: Qiime maqan oo loogu talagalay @namespace ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-selector-li: Liiska selector-ka maqan ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-supports-co: Shuruud maqan oo loogu talagalay @supports ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-missing-value-for-p: Qiime maqan oo loogu talagalay sifo $3 ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-newline-in-string: Xaraf khad cusub aan sax ahayn oo ku jira xariga ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-recursion-depth-exc: Xannibaado badan iyo/ama hawlaha aad u badan oo isku dhex jira ayaa ku jira khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-unclosed-comment: Faallo aan la xirin oo ka bilaabatay khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-unclosed-string: Xadhig aan la xirin oo ka bilaabatay khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unclosed-url: URL aan la xirin oo ka bilaabatay khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unexpected-eof: Dhammaad aan la filayn oo stylesheet-ka ah ee khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unexpected-eof-in-b: Dhammaad aan la filayn oo stylesheet-ka ah oo ku jira xannibaad ee khadka $1 xarafka $2.
templatestyles-error-unexpected-eof-in-f: Dhammaad aan la filayn oo stylesheet-ka ah oo ku jira hawlgalka ee khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unexpected-eof-in-r: Dhammaad aan la filayn oo stylesheet-ka ah ee xeerka ku jira ee khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unexpected-token-in: Calaamad aan la filayn oo ku jirta liiska caddeynta ee khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unrecognized-proper: Sifo aan la aqoonsan ama aan la taageerin ee khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
templatestyles-error-unrecognized-rule: Xeer aan la aqoonsan ama aan la taageerin ee khadka $1 xaraxa $2.
